# Meet Your New    AI Product Link To Video Maker

AI tool to convert product to video. Create ads from scripts, product URL to video, or product link to video AI free. Fast, easy, and social-ready.

How It Works

## How Product Link To Video Maker Works

Just enter your product link, pick a template, and boom - your next high-performing ad is ready.

### Paste Your Product URL

Input the product page link, and our AI product video generator will start to identifies key features, benefits, and selling points by scanning your product URL.

### Select a Templates

Pick a video layout tailored for TikTok, IG Reels, YouTube, or Meta. We provide diverse video templates and AI avatars for your selection.

### Customize & Preview

Now the product video maker converts your link to video content automatically, and you can review the scripts and revise as needed.

### Export & Share

Get your finished product video ready for any platform - from social media to product pages and email campaigns.

Smart. Fast. Effortless.

## Power Up Experience with Product Link To Video Maker

### Script to Video

Transform your text script into an engaging product video instantly. No editing skills required - just paste and generate.

![Script to Video](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/featues/Script-to-Video.webp)

### Multi-Platform Ready

Videos exported from product video maker are ready for every platform - Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, or your online store, without extra formatting editing.

![Multi-Platform Ready](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/featues/Multi-Platform-Ready.webp)

### Boost Output

Produce polished, scroll-stopping videos in minutes instead of weeks. Perfect for scaling campaigns and rapid A/B testing.

![Boost Output](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/featues/BoostOutput.webp)

### URL to Video

Turn any product page URL or existing product link into a video ad in minutes, automatically matching brand style.

![URL to Video](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/featues/URL-to-Video.webp)

## How Every Niche Wins with Product URL to Video

Product Link to Video Made for Every Market: Engage, Convert, and Scale

### Home Appliances

Home appliance retailers can turn static product listings into short demo videos showing energy efficiency, smart features, or ease of use — helping customers make confident purchase decisions.

![Home Appliances](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/image/product-linkFeature4.png)

### Beauty

Beauty brands can create authentic, on-brand tutorials or aesthetic product reels directly from their store pages, no studio needed.

![Beauty](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/image/product-linkFeature5.png)

### Electronics

Electronics sellers can generate comparison or unboxing-style videos in minutes, helping them stay ahead in a competitive market.

![Electronics](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/image/product-linkFeature6.png)

### Finance

Investment and financial service brands can transform text-heavy landing pages into visually engaging explainers that build credibility and guide viewers toward conversion.

![Finance](https://resource.admaker.ai/static/image/product-linkFeature7.png)
